title: Always cache config file resolution results
body:
V3ConfigWildcardResolver::resolve used to only cache the result of a name lookup if there were any directives applied to the queried name.

This can be a performance problem. E.g. the module resolver is invoked for every variable to check for attributes. If you had 'n' variables in the design, and you also had 'k' directives that apply to specific modules not involving most of the 'n' variables, then checking the attributes involved O(n*k) operations. This can be very expensive for large 'n' and 'k'.

In this patch we resolve every name exactly once, so the same above is now O(n) in the worst case, and often a lot smaller due to repeat lookups.
